home.aboutCardDescription: A static sample page from the UI starter content.
home.featureAccess: Protect frontend routes with backend session checks and role-aware navigation.
home.featureContent: Review sample pages and protected CRUD flows that exercise the API integration.
home.featureObservability: Verify backend readiness, health, and session behavior from the same shell.
home.federalCardDescription: Reference content page showing how the sample typography and content wrappers work.
home.heroTitle: Build secure service flows on top of a practical frontend shell.
home.loadingBody: Checking whether an authenticated backend session is already available.
home.optionalCardDescription: A second static content sample page wired into the current frontend routes.
home.quickLinksBody: Move into the authenticated flow or review the current integration endpoints from the frontend shell.
home.referenceSectionBody: Reference pages and content samples stay available below the main sign-in call to action.
home.signInAction: Sign in with GC identity provider
home.signedOutBody: Use session-based authentication through the backend to start the OIDC flow and return with a valid app session.
home.summary: This frontend now targets a session-first BFF-style integration with the backend for OIDC authentication and protected API access.
home.title: Digital service delivery starter

authComplete.summary: Revalidating the backend session before routing you into the protected experience.
authComplete.title: Signing you in

login.expiredBody: You are not logged in or your session expired. Sign in again to continue.
login.unauthorizedBody: Your session is no longer valid. Sign in again to continue.
login.summary: Start the OIDC sign-in flow through the backend.
login.title: Sign in

errors.badRequestBody: The request could not be completed as submitted. Review the current input and try again.
errors.forbiddenBody: Your current account does not have permission to complete this action.
errors.serverBody: The service is temporarily unavailable. Try again in a moment.

dashboard.errorBody: The dashboard could not load the profile or post summary data for this session.

dashboard.summary: Overview of your account and current post workflow.
